Test Steps:

 2. Include valid JSON payload.

Test Case Description: Send request with expired JWT token
Test Steps:
1. Obtain expired token. 

 2. Send POST request with expired token.

Test Case Description: Send request with empty Bearer token
Test Steps:
1. Send POST request with Authorization: Bearer. 

 2. Include valid JSON payload.

Test Case Description: Create pickup for different business location
Test Steps:
1. Obtain token for Business A. 

 2. Send request with businessLocationId belonging to Business B.
Expected Result: API returns 403 Forbidden or rejects request

Test Steps:

 2. Attempt to update User B bank info with User A token.

Test Case Description: IDOR: Update other user bank info
Test Steps:

 2. Observe if update affects User B.

 2. Observe server response.
Expected Result: API implements rate limiting (429 Too Many Requests)
